name: Lincoln Heights Gang
description: Lincoln Heights (LHTS) is a predominately Mexican-American street gang located in the neighborhood with the same name in northeast Los Angeles, California. The Lincoln Heights neighborhood is among one of Los Angeles’ oldest communities, dating back to the early 1800s. The neighborhood was formed off the banks of the Los Angeles River and grew to the east. The street gang, LHTS, formed between 1910 and 1920 making it one of the oldest active gangs in Los Angeles.

sources.title: Lincoln Heights (LHTS) gang in Northeast Los Angeles, California — StreetGangs
